mapper.sql: select f.id, f.tenant_id, f.invoice_no, f.invoice_code, f.invoice_date, f.amount, f.tax_amount, f.total_amount, f.buyer_name, f.buyer_tax_no, f.seller_name, f.seller_tax_no, f.supplier_id, s.name as supplier_name, f.audit_status, f.audit_by, f.audit_time, f.del_flag, f.delete_by, f.delete_time, f.remark, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time from fin_invoice f left join fd_supplier s on f.supplier_id = s.id
mapper.select: where f.id = #{id} and (f.del_flag = 0 or f.del_flag is null) and f.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: insert into fin_invoice (id, tenant_id, invoice_no, invoice_code, invoice_date, amount, tax_amount, total_amount, buyer_name, buyer_tax_no, seller_name, seller_tax_no, supplier_id, audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, del_flag, delete_by, delete_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{invoiceNo}, #{invoiceCode}, #{invoiceDate}, #{amount}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{buyerName}, #{buyerTaxNo}, #{sellerName}, #{sellerTaxNo}, #{supplierId}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, 0, #{deleteBy}, #{deleteTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update fin_invoice set audit_status = 1, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (audit_status = 0 or audit_status is null)
update fin_invoice set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
